# Architecture Decision Record (ADR) Template

## Title
[Short noun phrase describing the decision, e.g., "ADR-001: Adopt Pino for Structured Logging"]

## Status
[Proposed | Accepted | Rejected | Deprecated | Superseded]

## Context
[What is the issue that we're seeing that is motivating this decision or change? Describe the technological, architectural, or business context.]

## Decision
[What is the change that we're actually proposing and/or doing?]

## Consequences
[What becomes easier or more difficult to do because of this change? Consider performance, security, operational overhead, and developer experience.]

## Alternatives Considered
- [Alternative 1]: [Why it was rejected]
- [Alternative 2]: [Why it was rejected]
